summary: Cut repository release 0.177.109 from the exact-main Directus source commit 368cc0b8b95542846ed250a8cd305aac49f7e7ff, replayed make converge-directus across postgres-lv3, docker-runtime-lv3, and nginx-lv3, recovered from an external quay.io 502 during the first Keycloak image pull by committing bounded pull retries, and re-verified guest-local health, public health, token-authenticated REST and GraphQL access, and the published OpenAPI document, which advances platform_version to 0.130.72.

verification.observed: The exact-main release tree ran the ADR 0289 status, dry-run, and write paths successfully; the transcripts are preserved in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-release-status-r1-0.177.109.txt, receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-release-dry-run-r1-0.177.109.txt, and receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-release-write-r1-0.177.109.txt.

The first exact-main replay failed only because quay.io returned 502 Bad Gateway during the Keycloak image pull, captured in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-live-apply-r1-0.177.109.txt; after the committed bounded pull retries, the second replay succeeded with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 ok=275 changed=3 failed=0 skipped=87, postgres-lv3 ok=69 changed=2 failed=0 skipped=23, nginx-lv3 ok=40 changed=5 failed=0 skipped=6, and localhost ok=23 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=7, preserved in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-live-apply-r2-0.177.109.txt.

Guest-local verification preserved in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-compose-ps-r1-0.177.109.txt, receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-local-health-r1-0.177.109.txt, and receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-local-ping-r1-0.177.109.txt shows directus plus directus-openbao-agent healthy, health returning {"status":"ok"}, and ping returning pong.

The public publication checks preserved in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-dns-r1-0.177.109.txt, receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-public-health-r1-0.177.109.txt, receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-verify-public-r1-0.177.109.txt, and receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-mainline-openapi-r1-0.177.109.json confirm data.example.com resolves to 203.0.113.1, public health returns {"status":"ok"}, and the token-authenticated REST plus GraphQL verification returned status ok with one expected service_registry item.

The exact-main generators refreshed the ADR index, status docs, platform manifest, and ops portal snapshot at repository version 0.177.109 and platform version 0.130.72, preserved in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-generate-adr-index-r1-0.177.109.txt, receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-generate-status-docs-r1-0.177.109.txt, receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-generate-platform-manifest-r1-0.177.109.txt, and receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0289-generate-ops-portal-r1-0.177.109.txt.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0289 on repository release 0.177.109 and the first verified platform promotion to 0.130.72.

The first exact-main replay failure was external to the repo: quay.io returned 502 Bad Gateway during the Keycloak image pull. The committed retry loop in the Keycloak runtime role preserves successful replays without widening the mutation scope.

The earlier branch-local live apply remains preserved in receipts/live-applies/2026-03-30-adr-0289-directus-live-apply.json, while this receipt records the merged-main release truth and the first verified mainline platform version.
